data.title: ICANN CEO discusses 2026 domain expansion opportunities during visit to Turkey. President and CEO Kurtis Lindqvist concludes a two-day visit.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Istanbul, the President and CEO of the Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers (ICANN), Kurtis Lindqvist, completed a two-day visit to the Republic of... The global Internet community is gearing up for the upcoming expansion of domain names in 2026.

data.title: Lario Therapeutics gets $2.4m to expand calcium channel platform for CNS disorders, including Parkinson's Disease and PTSD.
data.description: Lario has recently obtained prestigious grants to enhance their calcium channel programs, expanding into Parkinson's disease and PTSD. This development builds upon past endorsements from The Michael J. Fox Foundation, reinforcing Lario's precision neuroscience endeavors.

data.title: Prinoth debuts PrinothView, digital shield for hazard detection, along with new products at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026. ST. PETER, Minn.
data.description: Prinoth has integrated hazard detection technology into its new remote-controlled Raptor 60 and compact Grizzly M300e mulcher, along with the Prinoth Connect fleet management platform. The announcement was made in St. Peter, Minnesota on February 19, 2026. Prinoth, known for its Jarraff by Prinoth tree care equipment, continues to innovate with these new additions.

data.title: Amsterdam, Berlin, and Frankfurt named top destinations for Brits to relocate to in Europe.
data.description: A recent study conducted by digital expat insurer Feather has unveiled the most popular European destinations for a hassle-free relocation. Amsterdam, Berlin, and Frankfurt have emerged as the top choices for individuals looking to make a simple move, as per the research findings released on February 19, 2026. The report highlights a growing trend of people opting to relocate, with an increasing number showing interest in moving to these cities.

data.title: Everbridge hosting London event on incident management at Churchill War Rooms for IT, DevOps, and operational leaders.
data.description: A company known as Everbridge, Inc., a prominent player in High Velocity Critical Event Management (CEM) and national public warning solutions, is scheduled to organize a customer event on March 17 at the Churchill War Rooms in London. This event aims to gather IT, DevOps, and operational leaders to converse about the changing requirements of current incident management and operational resilience. Themed as “The Future of Incident Management: A Blueprint for Operational Excellence,” the event will include discussions on strategies and best practices for successful incident management.

data.title: Sen. Warren criticizes Amazon's $7.8 billion tax break under Trump, equivalent to 100k years of average US income.
data.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren from Massachusetts expressed criticism regarding the significant tax break of $7.8 billion received by Amazon.com Inc. and its founder, Jeff Bezos, under President Donald Trump's new tax law. Warren highlighted in a post on Wednesday that Amazon's tax relief in 2025 equals the median U.S. household income for 100,000 years, approximately $78,000. To illustrate her point, Warren compared this tax relief to various figures, such as being four times the revenue generated by Taylor Swift's Eras Tour, which made $2 billion, and exceeding the earnings of celebrities like Kim Kardashian and LeBron James, as well as surpassing the average S&P 500 CEO's income. Despite the substantial earnings of these celebrities, they still earned considerably less than the tax benefits given to Bezos and other billionaires.

data.title: London Market brokers prefer digitally advanced insurers; 78%* say tech impacts business placement.
data.description: In London, the utilization of new digital technology by London Market insurers greatly impacts where brokers choose to conduct their business. A recent study conducted by Guidewire emphasized the importance of enhancing speed, integration, and overall ease of transactions for brokers. The inaugural Guidewire London Market Tech Barometer surveyed over 250 insurance brokers who predominantly work with London Market insurers. The findings revealed that approximately 78% of brokers consider insurer technology to be a significant factor in determining where they place their business. This study showcases the critical role that digital technology plays in the insurance market, highlighting the growing reliance on technological advancements within the industry.

data.title: SHEIN enhances supplier capabilities with Supplier Community Empowerment Program, launched in 2023. Strengthening manufacturing capability and supporting the community.
data.description: A program called the Supplier Community Empowerment Program (SCEP) by SHEIN, launched in 2023, aims to enhance its supplier ecosystem. This initiative in Singapore has shown significant progress with over the past three years. The program focuses on developing manufacturing capabilities and enhancing working conditions. With a commitment to sustainable practices, SHEIN is dedicated to improving the overall quality for its workforce. The ongoing success of SCEP is paving the way for a stronger and more empowered supplier community within SHEIN, which marks a positive step towards achieving its long-term goals.

data.title: AB Xelerate invests in Ubyx to enhance global digital money connections, strengthening regulated money flows globally.
data.description: Ubyx has introduced a system allowing for controlled digital currency transfers through global banking and blockchain systems. Recently, AB Xelerate, a Fintech Accelerator under Arab Bank, announced a significant investment in Ubyx Inc. This investment signifies a crucial step in enhancing Ubyx's clearing and acceptance services for international transactions. The integration aims to streamline digital financial operations and promote seamless cross-border money transfers. The partnership holds promise for revolutionizing the digital currency landscape, facilitating smoother transactions between different financial networks. The move has drawn attention from financial experts and is expected to drive significant advancements in the sector in the coming years.
Europe’s STOXX 600 falls 0.03%, with Britain’s FTSE 100 down 0.06%, France’s CAC 40 down 0.2%, and Spain’s IBEX down 0.16%.

data.title: Syngenta and Botanical Solution Inc. partner to bring Quillaja saponaria-based biofungicide to Americas, originated from Chile's forests.
data.description: In BASEL, Chile, and DAVIS, California, a collaboration between Syngenta and Botanical Solution Inc. (BSI) is harnessing the knowledge of the Mapuche people in Chile. The Mapuche have long used the Quillaja saponaria tree's bark for its cleansing and medicinal properties due to its rich saponin content. This partnership aims to leverage these traditional practices for modern agricultural needs. The agreement, which builds on centuries-old wisdom, will see the Quillaja saponaria tree being used to protect crops. This endeavor combines cutting-edge innovation with ancient knowledge to benefit farmers.

data.title: Truck Mounted Cranes Market: Valued at USD 2.7B in 2025, projected to reach USD 28.7B by 2036 with 8.1% CAGR. 15-30 Ton Class has 38% Share.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, on February 19, 2026, Future Market Insights (FMI) released information stating that the worldwide market for truck mounted cranes reached a value of $2.7 billion in 2025. Projections show this market is expected to grow to $13.2 billion in 2026, with further growth anticipated to reach $28.7 billion by 2036. The calculated compound annual growth rate (CAGR) throughout this period is expected to be at 8.1%.

data.title: Sectra unifies imaging for 2 NHS trusts in North West London with cloud platform to improve collaboration and speed diagnoses.
data.description: Sectra, a Swedish medical technology and cybersecurity company, recently announced the signing of an agreement to transition two of its current customers in the NHS in North West London to a collaborative, fully monitored cloud service for enterprise imaging. The agreement is a step towards providing advanced medical technology to a wider audience within the healthcare sector. The transition is planned to enhance operational efficiency and streamline processes while maintaining high levels of security.

data.title: Citymesh launches first 5G mobile service using Nokia & AWS, marking milestone in commercial technology.
data.description: Citymesh has successfully launched the first commercial mobile service utilizing 5G Core Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) technology. This groundbreaking service is made possible through a partnership with Nokia and AWS. The collaboration aims to revolutionize the mobile technology industry by providing cutting-edge 5G services to consumers. This milestone marks a significant advancement in the field, with Citymesh leading the way in innovation. This achievement highlights the potential of leveraging 5G technology to enhance connectivity and pave the way for future advancements. The successful implementation showcases the capabilities of the collaboration between Citymesh, Nokia, and AWS, setting a new standard in the industry.

data.title: cBrain reports EBT of DKK 56m, a margin of 22%, raises dividends by 56% amid strong earnings.
data.description: cBrain continues to demonstrate strong financial performance, reporting earnings before tax (EBT) of DKK 56 million, translating to an EBT margin of 22%.
